paragraph: The single-family market in Hasbrouck Heights is moving steadily, with 28 sales over six months at a median of $715,500. About 61 percent of homes sold above asking, and the sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.01, which tells you priced homes are moving without wild multiple-offer dynamics. The median days on market of 21 says homes that are listed right aren't sitting long, but they're also not flying off the shelf in two weeks. Multi-family properties are sparse here, only 3 sales in the same period at a median of $759,000, so don't read much into that tier. The real market is single-family, and it's the kind of competitive but balanced environment where good homes sell, pricing matters, and you're not caught in a frenzy.
